/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -L/workspaces/faster/ws/build/decomp_test_node/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/faster/ws/build/decomp_test_node/gtest/googlemock/gtest/src:/workspaces/faster/ws/build/decomp_test_node/gtest/googlemock/gtest -lpthread libgtest.so -lpthread
